products.name: PEUGEOT - LR01
products.description: The LR01 uses the same design as the most iconic bikes from PEUGEOT Cycles' 130-year history and combines it with agile, dynamic performance that's perfectly suited to navigating today's cities. As well as a lugged steel frame and iconic PEUGEOT black-and-white chequer design, this city bike also features a 16-speed Shimano Claris drivetrain.

products.name: SMITH - Trade
products.description: The Smith Trade helmet offers superior ventilation and a sleek aerodynamic profile. Ideal for road cyclists who demand both performance and style.

products.name: PILOT - CHROMOLY
products.description: The Pilot Chromoly 520 is built for the serious road cyclist. Its high-tensile chromoly steel frame delivers a smooth, responsive ride on any terrain.

products.name: COBI - E Urban
products.description: The COBI E Urban blends smart connectivity with powerful electric assist. Perfect for commuters who want a connected, effortless ride through the city.
